name_cn:
『YSL Saint Laurent』
🔥【Original Quality】
LOULOU PUFFER Quilted Satchel, 100% lambskin, soft and delicate touch, like holding a cloud ☁️; adorned with YSL metal logo, matte finish, and unique silver brushed metal hardware, satin lining, magnetic closure, one zippered interior pocket. Shoulder strap length: 52cm, folded length: 28cm
Size: 29x17x11cm
Model: 577476
